title: Korean-Style Kiwifruit Deopbap
description: A refreshing and sweet dessert inspired by Korean cuisine, featuring velvety deopbap topped with juicy kiwifruit and a hint of fatty richness.
instructions: Rinse the deopbap thoroughly and heat it in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally.
Combine the grated ginger and honey in a small bowl.
Add the honey-ginger mixture to the deopbap and stir to combine.
Cook the deopbap for about 5 minutes or until it's lightly toasted.
Transfer the deopbap to individual serving bowls.
Top each serving with sliced kiwi fruit.
Drizzle a small amount of sesame oil over the kiwi fruit.
Season with a pinch of salt to balance the flavors.
